title: Poraney Poraney Lyrics Vaagai Sooda Va Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: KG Ranjith, Neha Bhasin
Song: Poraney Poraney
Lyrics: Karthik Netha
Movie Name : Vaagai Sooda Vaa
Music Director : M Ghibran

Poraney Poraney ...
[Poraney Poraney kathoda thoothalapola
Poraney Poraney povaamathaan Poraney ] (2)
Azhagaai nee neranja
Adadaa pondhukul puviyap pola

[Poraley Poraley kathoda thoothalapola
Poraley Poraley povaamathaan Poraley] (2)

Paruvam, thodangi aasavachen,
Illaadha, saaamikum poosavachen
Mazhayil, nenanja kaatha pola,
Manasa neyum nenachuputta

Eerakulaaya konjam eravalthaaya
Unna manasa konjam punnayavaya
Aera eranga paarkum rosakaara
Tea thoolu vasam konda mosakkara

Ada nellanguruvi onnu manasa manasa
Siru kannanguliyile padhukiruche
Chinna chinna korathi ponnu kannu muliyathaan
Eechangaaya aanjiruche ...

[Poraney Poraney kathoda thoothalapola
Poraney Poraney povaamathaan Poraney ] (2)

kennathu nelava naanirundhen,
Kalla erinju kolapiputta
Unna paarthu pesayila
Rendaam murayaa kutha vachaen

Mookana kovurapola unnenappu
Cheembaalu vaasam pola un siripu
Adakaakum kozhi pola en thavippu
Posukinnu poothirike en pozhappu

Ada manja kelangae unna nenachi nenachi dhinam
Manasukulla vachi pootikitten
Un pinju viral pathicha manna eduthu naan
Thayathuku poosokitten

Poraley.. Poraley.. Poraley.. Poraley..
povaamathaan Poraney
Azhagaai nee neranja
Adadaa pondhukul puviyap pola ..

[Poraney Poraney kathoda thoothalapola
Poraney Poraney povaamathaan Poraney ](2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Poraney Poraney'?

The song 'Poraney Poraney' expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, capturing the essence of longing and affection.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Vaagai Sooda Va'?

In Vaagai Sooda Va, the song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, highlighting the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song is sung by K.G. Ranjith and Neha Bhasin, with music composed by M. Ghibran.

When was 'Poraney Poraney' released?

'Poraney Poraney' was released on July 5, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Poraney Poraney', the romantic duet beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and longing. The song features K.G. Ranjith and Neha Bhasin, whose voices blend harmoniously to convey heartfelt sentiments. Set against the backdrop of Vaagai Sooda Va, it enhances the romantic narrative of the film. The lyrics by Karthik Netha add depth, making it a memorable melody that resonates with listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Poraney Poraney from Vaagai Sooda Va is a delightful romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of K.G. Ranjith and Neha Bhasin, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and melodious composition by M. Ghibran. Experience the magic of this collaboration that resonates with every lover's heart.
stanzaMeanings: Oh dear, oh dear... like a message from the heart, oh dear, we won't go away. You are beautiful, like a flower blooming in the pond.
The season has started, I have become hopeful. Without it, I have become like a flower in the rain, my mind is also thinking.
In the fields, you are a little mischievous. Your heart is a bit playful. The tea that looks at the sky is like a trickster.
Oh little bird, your heart is gentle. In your small eyes, there is a sparkle. The little girl with beautiful eyes is like a treasure.
I was the moonlight, I got lost. I couldn't speak while looking at you. I made a second mistake.
Like a mute person, your smile is like a flower. My troubles are like a hen that clucks, blooming in my heart.
Oh, the yellow butterfly, I think of you every day. I have kept you in my heart. After touching your little finger, I have become a flower for my mother.
Oh dear... oh dear... oh dear... we won't go away. You are beautiful, like a flower blooming in the pond.
Oh dear... oh dear... oh dear...
